DestinationCountryCode - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.PaymentRequest.CommercialCard
Destination country code of the goods being shipped.
DestinationKeyIndex - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.ManageRequest
The destination key index should be [1, 99].
DestinationKeyType - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.ManageRequest
Support Key Type:
DestinationKeyValue - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.ManageRequest
Destination key plaintext or the cipher test, for DES keys, the destination key is the ciphertext which encrypted by the source key in the mode of 3DES ECB.
Valid the length of key value is 8, 16, 24.
Note: key data must be in ASCII format.
DestinationZipCode - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.PaymentRequest.CommercialCard
The destination zip code.
DestIP - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.CommSetting
Deprecated. 
DestPort - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.CommSetting
Deprecated.
